name: jsmap
description: Compact JavaScript API listings, name-based call graphs, candidate callers, and function extraction.

interface.shortDescription: Explore JavaScript without reading whole files
interface.longDescription: List APIs including nested helpers and test callbacks, map name-based call graphs, find candidate callers, and extract functions.
defaultPrompt: Map the call graph of this JavaScript codebase.
Show me the API of this JavaScript file.
Find candidate callers of this uniquely named JavaScript function.
